name: Lmchatopenai Workflow
description: Automated workflow: Lmchatopenai Workflow. This workflow integrates 16 different services: convertToFile, telegramTrigger, httpRequest, stickyNote, telegram. It contains 52 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.

nodes.name: Sticky Note5

parameters.content:
### Parse resume data
Create structured data from text extracted from resume. Chain uses OpenAI `gpt-4-turbo-preview` model and JSON response mode. **Adjust JSON schema in output parser to your needs.**

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Parse resume data

messageValues.message: Your task is to extract all necessary data such as first name, last name, experience, known technologies etc. from the provided resume text and return in well-unified JSON format. Do not make things up.

nodes.notes: This chainLlm node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.notes: This merge node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note6

parameters.content:
### Format HTML
Format HTML for each resume section (employment history, projects etc.).

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note7

parameters.content:
### Create HTML file
From formatted output create `index.html` file in order to run PDF conversion.

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note8

parameters.content:
### Convert file to PDF
Form `index.html` create PDF using [Gotenberg]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} If you're not familiar with this software, feel free to check out [my tutorial on YouTube]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}

originalWorkflowJson.name: Lmchatopenai Workflow
originalWorkflowJson.description: Automated workflow: Lmchatopenai Workflow. This workflow integrates 16 different services: convertToFile, telegramTrigger, httpRequest, stickyNote, telegram. It contains 52 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.
originalWorkflowJson.notes: Excellent quality workflow: Lmchatopenai Workflow. This workflow has been optimized for production use with comprehensive error handling, security, and documentation.

messageValues.message: Your task is to extract all necessary data such as first name, last name, experience, known technologies etc. from the provided resume text and return in well-unified JSON format. Do not make things up.

parameters.content:
### Add chat ID
Remember to set your actual ID to trigger automation from Telegram.

### Ignore start message
Workflow ignores initial`/start` message sent to the bot.

### Download resume file
Based on file ID, node performs downloading of the file uploaded by user.

### Extract text from PDF
Node extracts readable text form PDF.

### Parse resume data
Create structured data from text extracted from resume. Chain uses OpenAI `gpt-4-turbo-preview` model and JSON response mode. **Adjust JSON schema in output parser to your needs.**

### Format HTML
Format HTML for each resume section (employment history, projects etc.).

### Create HTML file
From formatted output create `index.html` file in order to run PDF conversion.

### Convert file to PDF
Form `index.html` create PDF using [Gotenberg]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }} If you're not familiar with this software, feel free to check out [my tutorial on YouTube]({{ $env.WEBHOOK_URL }}

### Send PDF file to user
Deliver converted PDF to Telegram user (based on chat ID).

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: open Ai  A P I details

testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
